backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines a PreOrder type and exposes two functions: submitPreOrder to store a new pre-order with a calculated total price, and getAllPreOrders to return all stored orders.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three gallery image replacement tasks in FarmGallerySection, each swapping an existing image with a new uploaded photo and updating its caption.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the N.B. Farm React app, including SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, Google Fonts preconnect, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Navigation, Hero, About, Products, FarmGallery, PreOrderForm, etc.) in order, separated by RangoliDivider components.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying the farm's story, a Gir cow illustration with a '3 Generations of Farming' badge, four feature cards, and a Sanskrit quote.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact and Orders section with WhatsApp, phone, and email contact cards, an Instagram social link, and a contact form that composes a WhatsApp message on submission.
Renders a delivery information section with four feature cards (local delivery, morning milk, mango shipping, bulk orders) and a WhatsApp CTA banner for N.B. Farm.
frontend/src/components/FarmGallerySecti: Displays a responsive photo gallery of farm images in a grid with a lightbox modal supporting next/previous navigation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, tagline, social links (Instagram, WhatsApp), and a quick-navigation links grid for N.B. Farm.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a farm sunrise background, headline, and two CTA buttons for ordering milk and pre-ordering mangoes.
Displays the farm's location with an embedded Google Maps iframe alongside an address card showing the physical address, phone numbers, and a directions link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo, desktop nav menu, and a WhatsApp 'Order Now' CTA button. Includes a mobile hamburger menu and scroll-based background styling.
frontend/src/components/PreOrderForm.tsx: Pre-order form component for mango variants with pricing logic, quantity selection, phone validation, and WhatsApp redirect. Submits order data to the backend via a mutation hook after opening WhatsApp.
Products section displaying Gir A2 milk, Kesar/Desi mangoes, farm lemons, and seasonal spice products with feature lists and WhatsApp order links.
frontend/src/components/RangoliDivider.t: Simple decorative divider component that renders a rangoli pattern image, with optional flip and custom className props.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Section displaying five value-proposition cards (farm fresh, ethical, chemical-free, direct delivery, traditional values) in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated and anonymous identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for submitting a pre-order mutation and fetching all pre-orders from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Kalam, Lato), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a farm-themed earthy color palette using OKLCH CSS variables for both light and dark modes, plus custom component classes like jute-texture and painted-border.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a target element by ID with a configurable pixel offset.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with farm-palette color tokens (mud, turmeric, leaf, terracotta), custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, using OKLCH CSS variables for semantic color roles.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the NB Farm website's current version, architectural notes, and completed features—primarily gallery image replacements (Lemon Trees, Flowering Mangoes, Farm Greenery) and social link updates.
